## Redirection class

A redirection is a component that sends the user to a link in the website. It is helpful when there are queries like `help`<!-- -->, `shipping costs`<!-- -->, `my account`<!-- -->, where a link to a section in the website will be more helpful than the set of results returned.

<b>Signature:</b>

```typescript
export default class Redirection extends Vue 
```
<b>Extends:</b> Vue

## Properties

|  Property | Modifiers | Type | Description |
|  --- | --- | --- | --- |
|  [delayInSeconds](./x-components.redirection.delayinseconds.md) |  | number | The waiting time in seconds until the redirection is made. |
|  [isRedirecting](./x-components.redirection.isredirecting.md) |  | boolean | Boolean flag which indicates if the redirection is running. |
|  [mode](./x-components.redirection.mode.md) |  | 'auto' \| 'manual' | The redirection mode. Auto for auto redirection and manual for an user interaction. |
|  [redirections](./x-components.redirection.redirections.md) |  | RedirectionModel\[\] |  |

## Methods

|  Method | Modifiers | Description |
|  --- | --- | --- |
|  [abortRedirect()](./x-components.redirection.abortredirect.md) |  | Stops the redirection, emitting <code>UserClickedAbortARedirection</code> event. |
|  [redirect()](./x-components.redirection.redirect.md) |  | Dispatches the redirection, updating the url. |
